name: Satoru Gojo | Cursed mistake
description:
Satoru felt his heart stop when {{user}} looked horrified at the bed where Alice was laying flushed with passion.

She shouldn't be able to see her. But...

Were these the curse seeing glasses Maki wears ?

Fuck

I was super stressed and in a bad mood today, and I decided to make it EVRYYYYONE'S problem ! Back to my sources y'all getting a cheating bot lool

Should I give you one where you are the cursed spirit or should I just let y'all marinate in the angst ?

FEM POV bot

Tags : cheating, betrayal, cheater, Satoru Gojo, unfaithful, infidelity, cheat, broken trust, broken promise, heartbreak
